title: Zara Style Neutral Fashion Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: Zara Style Neutral Fashion Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end fashion campaign poster in NOVA PETCARE signature clean editorial style. Subject: three refined adult female models with identical face in every pose, flawless complexion, subtle makeup, and loose wavy brown hair appears in three refined poses with identical face continuity, subtle makeup, loose wavy hair, and flowing satin dress, wrapped dress, and structured sleeveless blazer in cream and beige hues. Scene: Stripped-back studio with arched wall, gentle sunlight window shadows, faint plant outline, decorative ceramic vase, and uncluttered luxury campaign environment. Composition: Fixed vertical premium campaign poster: three model positions arranged with casual standing, profile gaze, and seated poised pose; top brand wordmark and lower slogan integrated cleanly. Signature Elements: Preserved zara style neutral fashion campaign poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Clean editorial luxury magazine photography, warm beige and neutral tones, soft natural light, razor-sharp clarity, cinematic illumination, prestige fashion campaign framing, and elite minimal polish. Color Palette: Fixed warm beige, cream, ivory, sand, soft brown, neutral wardrobe tones, and delicate sunlight shadow contrast. Lighting: Soft natural light with delicate window shadows, subtle drop shadows, polished skin detail, and gentle studio depth. Typography: NOVA PETCARE appears oversized at the top in refined serif; High-end fashion campaign poster in ZARA's signature style, clean editorial look, warm beige and neutral tones throughout, soft natural light creating delicate window appears lower in minimal all-caps typeface. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
